message.content:
Read these files and provide their FULL content (or a thorough summary if very long):

1. src/data/snippet_data.ts - to understand mock data pattern with categories
2. src/components/snippet_manager/snippet_manager_view.tsx - as it has create/edit form pattern, sections, filtering
3. src/extensions/snippets.tsx - to see extension registration

I need exact patterns: types, imports, hooks used, how SearchDropdown filtering works, how forms are pushed for edit, how keyboard shortcuts are registered, etc.

content.text: I'll read these three files to understand the patterns and structure you need.

content.content:
1→import type { TagColor } from '../constants/tag_colors'; 2→ 3→export interface SnippetEntry { 4→ id: string; 5→ name: string; 6→ keyword: string; 7→ content: string; 8→ category: 'general' | 'code' | 'email' | 'template'; 9→ tags: { 10→ text: string; 11→ color?: TagColor; 12→ }[]; 13→ createdAt: Date; 14→} 15→ 16→export type SnippetCategory = SnippetEntry['category']; 17→ 18→const SNIPPET_CATEGORY_VALUES: SnippetCategory[] = [ 19→ 'general', 20→ 'code', 21→ 'email', 22→ 'template', 23→]; 24→ 25→export function isSnippetCategory(v: string): v is SnippetCategory { 26→ return (SNIPPET_CATEGORY_VALUES as string[]).includes(v); 27→} 28→ 29→const now = Date.now(); 30→ 31→export const SNIPPET_CATEGORIES = [ 32→ { 33→ label: 'General', 34→ value: 'general', 35→ }, 36→ { 37→ label: 'Code', 38→ value: 'code', 39→ }, 40→ { 41→ label: 'Email', 42→ value: 'email', 43→ }, 44→ { 45→ label: 'Template', 46→ value: 'template', 47→ }, 48→] as const; 49→ 50→export const SNIPPET_TAGS = [ 51→ { 52→ label: 'JavaScript', 53→ value: 'javascript', 54→ color: 'yellow' as TagColor, 55→ }, 56→ { 57→ label: 'TypeScript', 58→ value: 'typescript', 59→ color: 'blue' as TagColor, 60→ }, 61→ { 62→ label: 'Python', 63→ value: 'python', 64→ color: 'green' as TagColor, 65→ }, 66→ { 67→ label: 'React', 68→ value: 'react', 69→ color: 'blue' as TagColor, 70→ }, 71→ { 72→ label: 'CSS', 73→ value: 'css', 74→ color: 'purple' as TagColor, 75→ }, 76→ { 77→ label: 'HTML', 78→ value: 'html', 79→ color: 'orange' as TagColor, 80→ }, 81→ { 82→ label: 'Shell', 83→ value: 'shell', 84→ color: 'green' as TagColor, 85→ }, 86→ { 87→ label: 'Markdown', 88→ value: 'markdown', 89→ color: 'orange' as TagColor, 90→ }, 91→] as const; 92→ 93→export const MOCK_SNIPPET_ENTRIES: SnippetEntry[] = [ 94→ { 95→ id: 'snip-1', 96→ name: 'Console Log', 97→ keyword: '!clog', 98→ content: 'console.log($1);', 99→ category: 'code', 100→ tags: [ 101→ { 102→ text: 'JavaScript', 103→ color: 'yellow', 104→ }, 105→ ], 106→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 30), 107→ }, 108→ { 109→ id: 'snip-2', 110→ name: 'React Component', 111→ keyword: '!rfc', 112→ content: 113→ 'export function $1({ $2 }: $1Props) {\n return (\n
\n $3\n
\n );\n}', 114→ category: 'code', 115→ tags: [ 116→ { 117→ text: 'React', 118→ color: 'blue', 119→ }, 120→ { 121→ text: 'TypeScript', 122→ color: 'blue', 123→ }, 124→ ], 125→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 25), 126→ }, 127→ { 128→ id: 'snip-3', 129→ name: 'Email Signature', 130→ keyword: '!sig', 131→ content: 132→ 'Best regards,\nJohn Doe\nSenior Developer\njohn@example.com\n+1 (555) 123-4567', 133→ category: 'email', 134→ tags: [], 135→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 60), 136→ }, 137→ { 138→ id: 'snip-4', 139→ name: 'Meeting Follow-up', 140→ keyword: '!follow', 141→ content: 142→ 'Hi $1,\n\nThank you for taking the time to meet today. Here is a summary of what we discussed:\n\n- $2\n\nPlease let me know if I missed anything.\n\nBest,', 143→ category: 'email', 144→ tags: [], 145→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 45), 146→ }, 147→ { 148→ id: 'snip-5', 149→ name: 'useState Hook', 150→ keyword: '!ush', 151→ content: 'const [$1, set$2] = useState<$3>($4);', 152→ category: 'code', 153→ tags: [ 154→ { 155→ text: 'React', 156→ color: 'blue', 157→ }, 158→ { 159→ text: 'TypeScript', 160→ color: 'blue', 161→ }, 162→ ], 163→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 20), 164→ }, 165→ { 166→ id: 'snip-6', 167→ name: 'Git Commit Message', 168→ keyword: '!gcm', 169→ content: 'feat($1): $2\n\n$3', 170→ category: 'general', 171→ tags: [ 172→ { 173→ text: 'Shell', 174→ color: 'green', 175→ }, 176→ ], 177→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 15), 178→ }, 179→ { 180→ id: 'snip-7', 181→ name: 'CSS Flexbox Center', 182→ keyword: '!center', 183→ content: 'display: flex;\nalign-items: center;\njustify-content: center;', 184→ category: 'code', 185→ tags: [ 186→ { 187→ text: 'CSS', 188→ color: 'purple', 189→ }, 190→ ], 191→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 50), 192→ }, 193→ { 194→ id: 'snip-8', 195→ name: 'PR Description', 196→ keyword: '!prd', 197→ content: 198→ '## Summary\n$1\n\n## Changes\n- $2\n\n## Test Plan\n- [ ] $3\n\n## Screenshots\n$4', 199→ category: 'template', 200→ tags: [ 201→ { 202→ text: 'Markdown', 203→ color: 'orange', 204→ }, 205→ ], 206→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 10), 207→ }, 208→ { 209→ id: 'snip-9', 210→ name: 'Python Main Guard', 211→ keyword: '!pymain', 212→ content: 'if __name__ == "__main__":\n main()', 213→ category: 'code', 214→ tags: [ 215→ { 216→ text: 'Python', 217→ color: 'green', 218→ }, 219→ ], 220→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 40), 221→ }, 222→ { 223→ id: 'snip-10', 224→ name: 'HTML Boilerplate', 225→ keyword: '!html', 226→ content: 227→ '\n\n\n \n \n $1\n\n\n $2\n\n', 228→ category: 'template', 229→ tags: [ 230→ { 231→ text: 'HTML', 232→ color: 'orange', 233→ }, 234→ ], 235→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 55), 236→ }, 237→ { 238→ id: 'snip-11', 239→ name: 'Bug Report', 240→ keyword: '!bug', 241→ content: 242→ '## Bug Report\n\n**Description:** $1\n\n**Steps to Reproduce:**\n1. $2\n\n**Expected:** $3\n\n**Actual:** $4\n\n**Environment:** $5', 243→ category: 'template', 244→ tags: [ 245→ { 246→ text: 'Markdown', 247→ color: 'orange', 248→ }, 249→ ], 250→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 5), 251→ }, 252→ { 253→ id: 'snip-12', 254→ name: 'Out of Office Reply', 255→ keyword: '!ooo', 256→ content: 257→ 'Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office from $1 to $2 with limited access to email.\n\nFor urgent matters, please contact $3.\n\nI will respond to your email upon my return.\n\nBest regards,', 258→ category: 'email', 259→ tags: [], 260→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 35), 261→ }, 262→ { 263→ id: 'snip-13', 264→ name: 'useEffect Cleanup', 265→ keyword: '!uef', 266→ content: 267→ 'useEffect(() => {\n $1\n\n return () => {\n $2\n };\n}, [$3]);', 268→ category: 'code', 269→ tags: [ 270→ { 271→ text: 'React', 272→ color: 'blue', 273→ }, 274→ ], 275→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 8), 276→ }, 277→ { 278→ id: 'snip-14', 279→ name: 'Address Block', 280→ keyword: '!addr', 281→ content: '$1\n$2\n$3, $4 $5', 282→ category: 'general', 283→ tags: [], 284→ createdAt: new Date(now - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 70), 285→ }, 286→]; 287→

1→import { SnippetsIcon } from '../../components/icons';
     2→import { SnippetManagerView } from '../../components/snippet_manager/snippet_manager_view';
     3→import type { ExtensionManifest } from '../../registry/types';
     4→
     5→export const snippetsExtension: ExtensionManifest = {
     6→  id: 'snippets',
     7→  name: 'Snippets',
     8→  icon: SnippetsIcon(),
     9→  description:
    10→    'Quickly find and insert your saved text snippets. Create shortcuts for frequently typed text.',
    11→  author: 'Raycast',
    12→  commands: [
    13→    {
    14→      name: 'snippets',
    15→      title: 'Search Snippets',
    16→      subtitle: 'Search Snippets',
    17→      icon: SnippetsIcon(),
    18→      keywords: [
    19→        'snippet',
    20→        'text',
    21→        'expand',
    22→        'template',
    23→      ],
    24→      mode: 'view',
    25→      component: SnippetManagerView,
    26→      fullView: true,
    27→      section: 'Suggestions',
    28→      accessories: [
    29→        { date: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 3) },
    30→        { text: 'Raycast' },
    31→      ],
    32→      detail: {
    33→        markdown: `# Search Snippets
    34→
    35→Quickly find and insert your saved text snippets. Create shortcuts for frequently typed text.
    36→
    37→## Usage
    38→1. Create a snippet with a keyword
    39→2. Type the keyword anywhere
    40→3. The snippet auto-expands`,
    41→        metadata: [
    42→          {
    43→            type: 'label',
    44→            title: 'Application',
    45→            text: 'Raycast',
    46→          },
    47→          {
    48→            type: 'label',
    49→            title: 'Type',
    50→            text: 'Command',
    51→          },
    52→        ],
    53→      },
    54→    },
    55→  ],
    56→};
    57→
